title: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
content: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
content: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
content: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries d

title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
content: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

title: NYC Health + Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
content: The New York public healthcare system said hackers stole personal and medical data, and scans of biometrics — including fingerprints — in one of the largest recorded breaches of 2026.

title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
content: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker — you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you wa

title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
content: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
content: The open source project said hackers stole its codebase and threatened to publish its source code if the company did not pay.

title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
content: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
content: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
content: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
content: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

title: For Eclipse, the $2.5B Cerebras win is just the start of realizing its  physical-world thesis
content: Investing in the real world was lonely for Lior Susan 10 years ago. Now his firm finds itself at the center of the tech world's action.

title: The haves and have-nots of the AI gold rush
content: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
content: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
content: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
content: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits.

title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
content: OpenAI's latest shake-up comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

title: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
content: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.
